description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a textured, speckled black exterior and bold red and blue accent panels on the sides and front. The front houses a large, slightly recessed display screen showing a racing game, flanked by a control panel with two sets of colored buttons and joysticks for multiplayer gameplay. The control panel is angled for ergonomic access and is color-coded to match the side accents, with blue controls on the left and orange on the right. The cabinet's top section is boxy and overhangs the screen, with a rough, stone-like finish. The rear of the cabinet is plain, with visible hinges suggesting an access door for maintenance. The overall build appears sturdy, likely constructed from wood or MDF with a laminate or painted finish, and the cabinet stands at a height suitable for standing play.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with a textured black finish, red and blue side accents, and a dual-player control panel. The front features a large screen displaying a racing game and color-coded controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a racing game, dual-player control panel with blue and orange buttons and joysticks, and red and blue side accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue accent panel, the angled control panel, and the overhanging top section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back with red and blue accents and visible hinges for an access door.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the red accent panel and the angled control panel with visible orange controls.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with visible bezel, medium size, typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls with one joystick and multiple colored buttons per player, arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, blue on the left and orange on the right.
